issues.description: TrashFromHand should trash from hand (generic cards), not Characters. The effect trashes '2 cards from your hand' (any cards), then adds Characters with 0 power to Life cards. These are separate actions.
TrashFromHand has cardType filter 'Character' but effect text says 'trash 2 cards from your hand' with no type restriction. Filter should be removed or be unrestricted.

PlayFromHand is incorrect. The effect adds Characters to Life cards (face-up), which is not a standard action. Should use a custom action like 'AddToLifeDeck' or similar, as this is a unique mechanic not covered by PlayFromHand.
Filter specifies Characters with power 0, but should also specify Characters you control ('your Characters').
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained and not in the card text. Should be removed.
The action is optional ('You may') but DSL does not express optionality. Should include 'optional:true' or similar mechanism.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] You may trash 2 cards from your hand: Add up to 1 of your Characters with 0 power to the top or bottom of the owner's Life cards face-up.
